center.name: 大沙沙漠
center.summary: 大沙沙漠是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Australasian darter、White-necked heron、澳洲鐘鵲等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found across Australia, though not in the Great Sandy or Great Victoria Deserts or Nullarbor Plain. It is an uncommon vagrant to Tasmania

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found across Western Australia, though it is absent from the Great Sandy Desert

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: HarperCollins Publishers. The species has thrived following the construction of irrigation, dams and other man-made water sources. The species is not found in some parts of Western Australia and South Australia, nor in the arid Great Sandy, Gibson, and Great Victoria Deserts or the Nullarbor Plain

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Australian magpie is found in the Trans-Fly region of southern New Guinea, between the Oriomo River and Muli Strait, and across most of Australia, bar the tip of Cape York, the Gibson and Great Sandy Deserts, and the southwest of Tasmania. The Australian magpie prefers open areas such as grassland, fields and residential areas such as parks, gardens, golf courses, and streets, with scattered trees or forest nearby
